title: Crypto Asset Risk Monitor
subtitle: Covering BTC, ETH, AI concept tokens and crypto-related equities, tracking speculative heat and drawdown risk in digital assets.

notice.title: Crypto Risk Notice
notice.content: Cryptocurrencies are highly correlated with AI concept stocks. When BTC drawdown risk and AI token heat rise simultaneously, it often signals overheated risk-asset speculation. Watch for leveraged crypto vehicles such as MSTR and COIN.
